headline: Anthropic scales infrastructure and approaches first profitable quarter
body: Anthropic is expanding its computational capacity with Colossus2 infrastructure using NVIDIA GB200 chips while reporting growth metrics that position the company toward profitability in its next quarter. The expansion signals Anthropic's confidence in sustained demand for Claude and its enterprise deployments. For healthcare AI stakeholders, this infrastructure scaling matters because vendor stability and compute availability directly affect clinical AI implementations, from EHR integration to diagnostic support systems. Healthcare organizations evaluating Anthropic as a foundation model partner should note the company's improved financial trajectory as a proxy for long-term service reliability and continued model development investment.
